name: experiment_ID
description: Experiment database key, links to ED table

name: option_for_crop_in_seq
description: Option for crop in sequence (e.g., crop failed)

name: irrigation_level
description: Irrigation level database key for treatments

name: fertilizer_level
description: Fertilizer level database key for treatments

name: environmental_modif_lev
description: Environmental modifications database key for treatment levels

name: harvest_operations_level
description: Harvest operations database key for treatment levels

name: simulation_control_level
description: Simulation control database key for treatment levels

name: mulch_level
description: Mulch treatment database key for treatment levels

name: cultivar_level
description: Genotype level, as listed in Treatments table under GE

name: cultivar_name_orig
description: Cultivar name as given in original (source) data

name: cultivar_class
description: Description according to commonly used scales (e.g., “hard red spring wheat”)

name: cultivar_seed_weight
description: Characteristic weight of a single representative seed

name: breeding_program
description: The program/company that developed the cultivar

name: accession_id
description: USDA Plant accession number of similar collection identifier

name: accession_location
description: Name of institution or collection that provided accession id (e.g. USDA)

name: pedigree
description: Immediate parents in Purdey notation or similar notation

name: cultivar_reference
description: URL, DOI or other link to description of cultivar

name: soil_ID
description: Unique soil identifier linking from SOIL_PROFILES

name: field_id
description: Field, identifier usually consisting of institution+site+4 digit number

name: field_country
description: Name of country where field is located

name: field_sub_country
description: First political subdivision for field location (e.g., state, province, department)

name: field_sub_sub_country
description: Second political subdivision for field location (e.g, county)

name: field_longitude
description: Field longitude, E positive, W negative

name: field_loc_anon
description: Anonymization of field location (Y or N)

name: field_location_source
description: Source of field location data, indication of accuracy of FL_LAT and FL_LONG

name: field_geocoord_original
description: Original geocoordinates as given in source as text

name: field_slope_aspect
description: Field slope aspect, W, nW, etc.

name: field_plow_layer_compac
description: Field plow layer compaction (0 to 1 scale)

name: field_history
description: History based on intensity, crops, or prior vegetation

name: weather_sta_identifier
description: Subset name for a single weather station

name: wsta_distance
description: Distance from weather station to field (m)

name: soil_file
description: File containing relevant soil profile description

name: soil_analysis_day
description: Soil analysis day of year or days after planting

description: Soil analysis method for Sulfur, extractable

name: soil_anal_meth_extract_B
description: Soil analysis method for Boron, extractable

name: drainage_rate_per_day

name: soil_analysis_level
description: Soil analysis, treatment level identifier linkage

description: Soil bulk density, moist, determined on field sample

description: Stable organic carbon by layer expressed as g[C]/100g[soil]

name: plant_spacing
